data.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 8c2c95b1). Reader-level env renames (prefer new name, fall back to old with deprecation warning) for the advanced reconciler/llm raw-env knobs. (1) REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT->REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT. (2) REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES — also fixed a pre-existing bug where the WS1 alias read the same var name twice (no-op). (3) RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT. (4) REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS->REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS (+ clearer doc + runner message). (5) REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS with the value-flip: raise->false (guard active), warn->true (bypass); new _resolve_id_guard_bypass (canonical env > deprecated REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE env > legacy config rebar_id_guard_mode > default False fail-CLOSED); bypass emits a LOUD per-violation warning. ACs met: each renamed + old-name aliased with warning; defaults unchanged; id-guard value-flip with alias mapping + loud warning. SECURITY verified by subagent review: default fail-closed, garbage canonical bypass->False (safe), NO fail-open regression. 16 new tests (canonical/alias/canonical-wins each; id-guard default-active/bool/env+config value-flip; llm alias). Existing reconciler/llm suites green via aliases (123 affected). Full offline suite green: 1966 passed. ruff check + format clean. Verify gate untouched. Last EV-3 sub-ticket -> unblocks 15f6.
